     The Numbers Business Report

Playing with Fire (2019)

Theatrical Performance
Domestic Box Office $44,451,847Details
International Box Office $16,784,873
Worldwide Box Office $61,236,720
Domestic Physical Disc Sales
DVD Sales (estimated) $4,301,575
Blu-ray Sales (estimated) $3,094,512
Total $7,396,087
Further financial details...

Synopsis

When straight-laced fire superintendent Jake Carson and his elite team of expert firefighters come to the rescue of three siblings in the path of an encroaching wildfire, they quickly realize that no amount of training could prepare them for their most challenging job yet — babysitters. Unable to locate the children’s parents, the firefighters have their lives, jobs and even their fire depot turned upside down and quickly learn that kids — much like fires — are wild and unpredictable.

Metrics

Opening Weekend:$12,723,781 (28.6% of total gross)
Legs:3.49 (domestic box office/biggest weekend)
Domestic Share:72.6% (domestic box office/worldwide)
Theater counts:3,125 opening theaters/3,125 max. theaters, 5.1 weeks average run per theater
Infl. Adj. Dom. BO $58,038,890

Movie Details

Domestic Releases: November 8th, 2019 (Wide) by Paramount Pictures
International Releases: November 8th, 2019 (Wide) (United Arab Emirates)
November 8th, 2019 (Wide) (Colombia)
November 8th, 2019 (Wide) (Vietnam)
November 8th, 2019 (Wide), released as Quem Brinca com o Fogo... (Portugal)
November 8th, 2019 (Wide), released as Не си играй с огъня (Bulgaria)
Video Release: February 4th, 2020 by Paramount Home Video
MPA Rating: PG for rude humor, some suggestive material and mild peril.
(Rating bulletin 2599 (Cert #52316), 10/9/2019)
Running Time: 96 minutes
Cast, crew, or production detail: Animal Lead, Outtakes During Credits
Plot point: Child Protective Services, Firefighter, Fugitive / On the Run, Orphan, Promotion, Romance, Runaway, Unexpected Families, Young Child Dealing with the Death of a Parent
Subgenre: Family Comedy
Target audience: Family Movie
Source:Original Screenplay
Genre:Comedy
Production Method:Live Action
Creative Type:Contemporary Fiction
Production/Financing Companies: Broken Road, Paramount Players, Nickelodeon Films, Paramount Pictures, Walden Media
Production Countries: United States
Languages: English

Synopsis

When straight-laced fire superintendent Jake Carson and his elite team of expert firefighters come to the rescue of three siblings in the path of an encroaching wildfire, they quickly realize that no amount of training could prepare them for their most challenging job yet — babysitters. Unable to locate the children’s parents, the firefighters have their lives, jobs and even their fire depot turned upside down and quickly learn that kids — much like fires — are wild and unpredictable.
